name: Boston Baked Corn
recipeIngredient: 2 cans whole kernel corn, drained (12 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a bowl, combine the mustard, salt, brown sugar, and catsup.
3. Add the diced onion and corn to the mixture; stir until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a greased 1 1/2 quart casserole dish.
5. Top with bacon slices.
6. Bake for 40 minutes or until the bacon is crisp.
